message:
Widen JS extension sandbox to allow temp dir, ~/.pi, and ~/.wakatime

Extensions that read/write to the system temp directory, the ~/.pi
configuration directory, or the ~/.wakatime directory were being blocked
by the sandbox path check. Add safe_canonicalize checks for
std::env::temp_dir(), ~/.pi, and ~/.wakatime alongside the existing
workspace_root and ext_root allowlist entries.

This enables extensions that legitimately need to persist state or
read configuration from these well-known paths without requiring
the workspace root to encompass them.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -12,7 +12,7 @@
           "print": false,
           "no_session": false,
           "no_tools": false,
-          "tools": "read,bash,edit,write",
+          "tools": "read,bash,edit,write,hashline_edit",
           "no_extensions": false,
           "no_skills": false,
           "no_prompt_templates": false,
